summary: Remove 56 unused exports from 10 package public APIs to reduce API surface area
details: Removed exports from index.js files that had zero external consumers. Internal module exports preserved for test compatibility. Packages: config-loader (13), validator (9), model-router-x (10), learning-engine (9), memory-graph (6), fallback-doctor (5), sisyphus-state (1), integration-layer (1), plugin-preload-skills (1), skill-rl-manager (1).
impact: Low - removes unused public API exports with no external callers
